description: Evercrafted Visual Companion — Midjourney prompt packs, batch 2 (15 designs with client customizations)

client_customizations: Dry-brush tips of select cedar sprigs and pinecone edges with gold metallic acrylic, very sparingly
Add 3-5 ultra-thin gold wire loops around the outer edge as halo rings
Optional small gold initial charm wired at 8 o'clock
prompt_packs.subject: 22 inch thick fir and cedar evergreen ring, 85 percent full, weight heavier from 7 to 10 o'clock, magnolia leaves and pinecones, select foliage tips and pinecone edges brushed with subtle gold metallic paint, deep green velvet bow at lower left

base_camera.depth_of_field: moderate, wreath sharp, door slightly soft

base_quality.notes: gold tips should be subtle not garish; deep green velvet ribbon anchors the palette

hero.prompt: luxurious grounded winter wreath, 22 inch thick fir and cedar ring 85 percent full, weight slightly heavier on left side, magnolia leaves and pinecones, select foliage tips and pinecone edges brushed with subtle gold metallic paint, deep green velvet bow at lower left, soft textured neutral front door, warm daylight, ultra realistic product photo, style raw
hero.notes: hero for main catalog; gold accents must read as refined not decorative

variations.prompt: same gilded evergreen wreath on a dark charcoal door, moodier side lighting to make gold tips glow, classic holiday townhouse setting, ultra realistic, style raw

dial.palette_shift: dark door amplifies gold glow
dial.context_shift: door changed to charcoal

variations.prompt: close-up of the lower left section of a gilded evergreen wreath showing gold-painted fir tips and deep green velvet ribbon texture, shallow depth of field, editorial macro product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to macro detail
dial.camera_shift: close-up with shallow depth of field

variations.prompt: same evergreen wreath but with fewer gold accents and added matte brass bells group at 7 o'clock, warm wood door background, soft overcast daylight, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: warm wood door, brass replaces some gold
dial.context_shift: warm wood door, brass bells added

client_customizations: Hand ink-dip ends of 5-7 leaves with deep black fabric paint for ombre tips
Add 2-3 matte black wood beads on invisible thread hanging inside ring
Write a tiny word in gold on one leaf — rest, home, breathe
prompt_packs.subject: 18 inch grapevine with 50 percent exposed, airy crescent of silver dollar and seeded eucalyptus from 3 to 7 o'clock, select leaf tips ink-dipped in deep black ombre, narrow black linen ribbon tail

base_environment.lighting: soft natural light, no hard shadows

base_quality.notes: ink-dipped ombre must read clearly; exposed vine is part of the composition not negative space to fill

hero.prompt: minimal modern eucalyptus wreath, 18 inch grapevine with half exposed, airy crescent of silver dollar and seeded eucalyptus from 3 to 7 o'clock, select leaf tips ink-dipped in deep black ombre, narrow black linen ribbon tail, styled on a white wall, soft natural light, ultra realistic, style raw
hero.notes: the ink dip ombre is the hero detail; crescent must feel airy and intentional not sparse

variations.prompt: same ink-dipped eucalyptus wreath on a concrete loft wall, cooler light, urban modern styling, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: concrete wall shifts palette to cool gray
dial.context_shift: wall changed to concrete

variations.prompt: close-up macro of ink-dipped eucalyptus leaves showing gradient transition from green to deep black, shallow depth of field, editorial product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to leaf macro
dial.camera_shift: macro with shallow depth of field

variations.prompt: same ink-dipped eucalyptus composition with matte black beads hanging inside ring and a tiny gold handwritten word on one leaf, warmer light on a pale beige wall, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: warm beige wall, gold word adds warmth
dial.context_shift: beige wall, black beads and gold word added

client_customizations: Clear-gloss coat on some berry clusters, leaving others matte for a mixed finish
Light copper metallic dry-brushing along edges of a few broad leaves
3-4 ultra-thin copper wire coils echoing the wreath circle
prompt_packs.subject: 20 inch mixed cedar and boxwood ring, medium fullness, extra density from 4 to 8 o'clock, red berries with mix of matte and glossy finishes, subtle copper metallic edges on select leaves, deep red velvet bow at 6 o'clock

base_environment.background: classic front door, warm wood or painted

base_quality.notes: mixed matte and gloss berry finish is the key detail; copper must be subtle not dominant

hero.prompt: refined holiday wreath, 20 inch mixed cedar and boxwood ring, slightly fuller arc from 4 to 8 o'clock, red berries with a mix of matte and glossy finishes, subtle copper metallic edges on select leaves, deep red velvet bow at 6 o'clock, traditional front door, warm evening light, ultra realistic product photo, style raw
hero.notes: the contrast between matte and glossy berries is the signature detail; emphasize this in the render

variations.prompt: same burnished berry wreath on a black door with brass hardware, more dramatic lighting, copper leaf highlights emphasized, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: black door makes copper and red pop
dial.context_shift: door changed to black with brass hardware

variations.prompt: close crop of mixed matte and glossy red berries and copper-brushed foliage on a holiday wreath, shallow depth of field, editorial texture study, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to berry and leaf macro
dial.camera_shift: close-up with shallow depth of field

variations.prompt: same wreath design but with burgundy berries and a darker cranberry ribbon, slightly moodier palette, soft overcast daylight on warm door, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: burgundy and cranberry deepen the palette
dial.context_shift: berry and ribbon color shifted to burgundy

client_customizations: Silver-gray frost spray misted only on outer tips
Tiny graphite speckles on select dusty miller leaves
2-3 small clear quartz points tucked at 2, 6, and 10 o'clock
prompt_packs.subject: 18 inch foam ring covered in fine asparagus fern and dusty miller, perfectly round halo, lightly frosted silver-gray outer tips, tiny graphite speckles on a few leaves, small clear quartz points tucked subtly around ring

base_environment.lighting: cool diffused light, no harsh shadows

base_quality.notes: quartz points should catch light subtly; frosted tips must read as organic not painted; halo silhouette must be perfectly round

hero.prompt: cool serene wreath, 18 inch ring covered in fine asparagus fern and dusty miller, perfectly round halo with lightly frosted silver-gray tips, tiny graphite speckles on a few leaves, small clear quartz points tucked subtly around ring, soft gray wall background, cool diffused light, ultra realistic, style raw
hero.notes: roundness and quiet texture are the design; quartz must feel discovered not displayed

variations.prompt: same frosted graphite fern wreath on a dark slate wall, more contrast and slightly stronger side lighting, modern winter mood, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: dark slate amplifies silver-gray tones
dial.context_shift: wall changed to dark slate

variations.prompt: macro close-up of frosted asparagus fern tips and small quartz crystal point detail on a graphite fern wreath, shallow depth of field, editorial product shot, style raw

dial.density_shift: macro amplifies frost and mineral texture
dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to botanical and crystal macro
dial.camera_shift: close-up with shallow depth of field

variations.prompt: same fern ring composition with slightly more dusty miller and fewer quartz points for a softer less mystical feel, pale beige background, cool diffused light, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: beige wall warms the cool palette slightly
dial.context_shift: background changed to pale beige, fewer quartz

client_customizations: Hand-paint stripes or dots onto linen tail with fabric paint
Include 3 interchangeable linen tails — plain, striped, abstract — for seasonal swapping
Tiny handwritten date or house number at ribbon tip
prompt_packs.subject: 16 inch brass hoop mostly bare, small crescent of olive and ruscus from 4 to 7 o'clock, single linen ribbon tail hand-painted with subtle stripes

base_quality.notes: negative space is the design; hand-painted linen detail must feel artisan not printed

hero.prompt: minimalist hoop wreath, 16 inch brass ring mostly bare, small crescent of olive and ruscus from 4 to 7 o'clock, single linen ribbon tail hand-painted with subtle stripes, hanging on a clean white wall, Scandinavian-inspired styling, soft daylight, ultra realistic product photo, style raw
hero.notes: brass hoop and linen tail are the hero elements; negative space must dominate the composition

variations.prompt: same brass hoop wreath with a polka-dot hand-painted linen tail, styled on a light wood wall, cozy minimal interior, soft warm light, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: wood wall adds warmth, dots add playfulness
dial.context_shift: wall changed to light wood, ribbon changed to polka dot

variations.prompt: top-down flat lay of a 16 inch brass hoop wreath and three interchangeable linen ribbon tails arranged beside it, plain, striped, and abstract painted, styling kit concept on a white linen surface, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.density_shift: no change, exploded view shows all options
dial.palette_shift: white linen surface, neutral tones throughout
dial.context_shift: flat lay with all three ribbon options visible

variations.prompt: same minimal brass hoop wreath with plain ribbon tail and a small house number handwritten at the tip in ink, closer crop focusing on the personalization detail at ribbon end, shallow depth of field, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: plain ribbon with handwritten number added
dial.camera_shift: closer crop focusing on ribbon tip

client_customizations: Thin bronze metallic paint line along underside brown edges of select leaves
3-5 small bronze hex nuts or hardware pieces hidden in foliage as discoverable accents
Optional fragrance sachet hidden behind leaves
prompt_packs.subject: 22 inch dense magnolia leaf ring, even but slightly heavier bottom half, glossy green and warm brown magnolia leaves, select underside leaf edges traced in thin bronze metallic paint, tiny bronze hardware accents hidden in foliage

base_quality.notes: bronze edge lines are the signature detail — thin and precise; hardware accents should feel discovered not obvious

hero.prompt: classic magnolia wreath, 22 inch ring of glossy green and warm brown magnolia leaves, dense and full, select underside leaf edges traced in thin bronze metallic paint, tiny bronze hardware accents hidden in foliage, styled on a dark wood door, warm evening light, ultra realistic, style raw
hero.notes: the bronze edge lines on the dark brown underside of magnolia leaves is the key detail; hardware must read as intentional not accidental

variations.prompt: same bronzed magnolia wreath on a white door, softer neutral lighting, metallic bronze edges on leaves clearly emphasized, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: white door makes dark leaves and bronze pop
dial.context_shift: door changed to white

variations.prompt: close-up shot of bronzed leaf edges and hidden hardware detail on a magnolia wreath, shallow depth of field, editorial texture study, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to leaf edge and hardware macro
dial.camera_shift: close-up with shallow depth of field

variations.prompt: same bronzed magnolia design with slightly looser foliage for more negative space between leaves, fragrance sachet tag peeking subtly from the back, warm daylight on a pale door, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: pale door, warm daylight, softer palette
dial.context_shift: looser foliage, fragrance tag added at back

client_customizations: 4-6 blank silk petals or paper leaves for handwritten names, dates, or words
Metallic pen trio included for petal calligraphy
Pressed-flower mini kit for adding personal memories
prompt_packs.subject: 18 inch neutral vine or wrapped ring, light floral ring with three soft cluster points at 12, 4, and 8 o'clock, silk roses and ranunculus, several blank petals with delicate metallic handwritten names and dates

base_quality.notes: handwritten names on petals must be legible but delicate; three cluster points should feel rhythmic not symmetrical

hero.prompt: sentimental floral wreath, 18 inch ring with soft silk roses and ranunculus spaced around, three gentle cluster points at 12, 4 and 8, several blank petals with delicate metallic handwritten names and dates, light greenery, styled on a pale wall, warm soft light, ultra realistic keepsake decor, style raw
hero.notes: the calligraphy on petals is the emotional hook; names and dates should be rendered clearly enough to read

variations.prompt: same calligraphy floral wreath with only one word written on a single petal in metallic ink, the word home, close-up focus on that petal, shallow depth of field, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: single word petal becomes the composition
dial.camera_shift: close-up with shallow depth of field on petal

variations.prompt: same petal calligraphy wreath photographed flat on a linen surface with metallic pens and pressed flowers arranged artfully around it, storytelling styling shot, warm natural light, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.density_shift: no change, seen with surrounding props
dial.palette_shift: linen surface, pressed flower colors add warmth
dial.context_shift: flat lay with pens and flowers as props

variations.prompt: same floral wreath composition but with cooler light and more negative space between blooms, minimal modern keepsake look on a white wall, fewer petals with writing, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.density_shift: slightly less dense, more negative space
dial.palette_shift: cooler light and white wall reduce warmth
dial.context_shift: white wall, fewer calligraphy petals

client_customizations: Diluted watercolor wash dabbed on herb tips in blue-green tones
Blank mini wooden herb tags for handwritten herb names or personal intentions
Mini glass bottle charm for dried herbs, salt, or spices
prompt_packs.subject: 20 inch grapevine with 40 percent exposed, airy swag of rosemary, thyme, sage and lavender from 2 to 7 o'clock, select herb tips with soft watercolor-like blue-green wash, small handwritten wooden herb tags and tiny glass bottle charm

base_quality.notes: watercolor wash on herb tips must feel hand-applied; wooden tags must be readable; glass bottle charm is a small discovery element

hero.prompt: restorative herb wreath, 20 inch grapevine with 40 percent exposed, airy swag of rosemary, thyme, sage and a touch of lavender from 2 to 7 o'clock, select herb tips with soft watercolor-like blue-green wash, small handwritten wooden herb tags and a tiny glass bottle charm, styled on a kitchen door, natural daylight, ultra realistic, style raw
hero.notes: watercolor wash on tips is the signature; herbs must feel real and aromatic in the render

variations.prompt: same herb wreath on a pantry door, slightly warmer light, rustic kitchen background with countertop and jars softly blurred behind, ultra realistic lifestyle photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: warm kitchen light enriches herb greens
dial.context_shift: pantry door, kitchen visible in soft background
dial.camera_shift: same framing, kitchen in soft background

variations.prompt: close-up of watercolor-washed herb tips and a small wooden tag on a herb wreath, shallow depth of field, lifestyle product detail shot, style raw

dial.density_shift: macro amplifies watercolor and tag detail
dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to herb tip and tag macro
dial.camera_shift: close-up with shallow depth of field

dial.density_shift: lighter herb placement, more vine exposed
dial.palette_shift: white wall and soft light reduce warmth
dial.context_shift: white wall, fewer tags, more exposed vine

client_customizations: Gradient-painted ribbon from deep jewel tones to pale hues that clients can twist to reveal aurora-like color shifts
2-3 slim metallic threads in gold, silver, and rose gold wrapped like light bands
Tiny sew-on crystals along ribbon edges
prompt_packs.subject: 18 inch full boxwood ring wrapped with a gradient-painted ribbon from deep jewel tones to pale hues, twisted to reveal aurora-like color shifts, slim metallic threads circling the wreath, tiny crystals on ribbon edges

base_environment.lighting: evening light showing ribbon colors and crystal sparkle

base_quality.notes: gradient ribbon must show clear color transition; metallic threads and crystals should catch light; twist creates aurora depth effect

hero.prompt: joyful evergreen wreath, 18 inch full boxwood ring, wrapped with a gradient-painted ribbon from deep jewel tones to pale hues, twisted to reveal aurora-like color shifts, slim metallic threads circling the wreath and tiny crystals on the ribbon edge, styled on a neutral front door, evening light, ultra realistic, style raw
hero.notes: the twisted gradient ribbon is the centerpiece; metallic threads and crystals should catch light at different points

variations.prompt: same aurora ribbon wreath on a dark door, stronger directional lighting to make metallic threads and crystals sparkle against the deep background, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: dark door makes ribbon gradient and sparkle pop
dial.context_shift: door changed to dark, directional spotlight

variations.prompt: close-up macro of aurora ribbon gradient and crystal edge detail on an evergreen wreath, shallow depth of field, editorial product macro, style raw

dial.density_shift: macro amplifies ribbon and crystal detail

dial.context_shift: abstracted to ribbon and crystal macro
dial.camera_shift: macro with shallow depth of field

dial.palette_shift: blue-green gradient replaces jewel tones, silver only
dial.context_shift: white wall, cooler palette throughout

client_customizations: 2-3 mini chalkboard tags in cluster for rotating messages that change with seasons or moods
Matte clear sealant option when they want to fix a written word permanently
Tiny white painted polka dots on neutral pods
prompt_packs.subject: 20 inch green ring with fuller cluster from 3 to 5 o'clock, neutral pods and small berries, several tiny chalkboard tags with handwritten messages in white marker, subtle white polka dots painted on pods

base_quality.notes: chalkboard tag messages must be legible; polka dot pods must feel hand-painted; cluster fullness contrasts with rest of ring

hero.prompt: playful customizable wreath, 20 inch green ring with a fuller cluster from 3 to 5 o'clock, neutral pods and berries, several tiny chalkboard tags with handwritten messages in white marker, subtle white polka dots painted on pods, styled on a family front door, bright daytime light, ultra realistic, style raw
hero.notes: the chalkboard tags are the interactive personality of this wreath; messages should vary in the render

variations.prompt: same chalkboard cluster wreath with the word welcome written on one prominent tag in white chalk, close-up view of the cluster, shallow depth of field, style raw

client_customizations: Back-paint some citrus slices with transparent glass paints in amber, ruby, and teal so they glow like stained glass
Ultra-thin metallic ring drawn inside some citrus rinds
Optional backlighting tea-light clip to test glow effect in person
prompt_packs.subject: 22 inch evergreen ring with bold citrus crescent from 4 to 9 o'clock, dried orange lemon and lime slices painted on back with transparent jewel-tone glass paints, fine metallic rings drawn inside some rinds

base_environment.context: front door or window with light source behind
base_environment.background: neutral door with light shining through slices
base_environment.lighting: light from behind illuminating painted citrus

base_quality.notes: back-painted citrus glow is the hero detail; jewel tones should be rich and translucent not opaque; metallic rings inside rinds add geometry

hero.prompt: artistic winter wreath, 22 inch evergreen ring with a bold citrus crescent from 4 to 9 o'clock, dried orange lemon and lime slices painted on the back with transparent jewel-tone glass paints so they glow like stained glass, fine metallic rings drawn inside some rinds, styled on a neutral door with light shining through slices, ultra realistic, style raw
hero.notes: the translucent glow of back-painted citrus is the centerpiece; render must show light passing through

variations.prompt: same stained-glass citrus wreath positioned in a window with strong sunlight illuminating the colored slices from behind, room interior softly blurred, ultra realistic window lifestyle photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: sunlight intensifies jewel tones through glass paint
dial.context_shift: moved to window, sunlight from behind
dial.camera_shift: wider shot showing window frame and incoming light

variations.prompt: close-up macro of back-painted citrus slices and metallic rings on an evergreen wreath, translucent jewel tones glowing, shallow depth of field, macro product photography, style raw

dial.density_shift: macro reveals glass paint and metallic ring detail

dial.context_shift: abstracted to citrus slice macro
dial.camera_shift: macro with shallow depth of field

client_customizations: Metallic silver and midnight blue splatter paint across visible dark vine
Small constellation stencil to paint a personal star pattern on one section
Optional micro LED lights woven through like a Milky Way
prompt_packs.subject: 18 inch dark grapevine ring with sparse eucalyptus and dark berries, visible vine splattered with tiny metallic silver and midnight blue paint like stars, subtle constellation pattern on one section, thin micro LED lights woven through

base_camera.depth_of_field: moderate, splatter and lights in focus

base_environment.lighting: low ambient light showing LED glow and metallic splatter

base_quality.notes: metallic splatter must read as star-like not messy; micro LEDs create genuine Milky Way effect; dark base vine is essential as canvas

hero.prompt: mystical galaxy-inspired wreath, 18 inch dark grapevine ring with sparse eucalyptus and dark berries, visible vine splattered with tiny metallic silver and midnight blue paint like stars, subtle constellation pattern on one section, thin micro LED lights woven through, styled on a deep navy wall, low ambient light, ultra realistic, style raw
hero.notes: the galaxy effect is the entire concept; dark vine must show clearly as the canvas for splatter and lights

variations.prompt: same galaxy wreath on a white wall with lights off, metallic splatter and constellation pattern emphasized in soft daylight, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: white wall makes dark vine and silver splatter high contrast
dial.context_shift: white wall, lights off, daylight

variations.prompt: close-up macro of splatter-painted dark grapevine and tiny glowing micro LED lights on a galaxy wreath, shallow depth of field, dreamy night-sky effect, style raw

dial.density_shift: macro amplifies splatter and light detail
dial.palette_shift: no change, dark palette intensified in close crop
dial.context_shift: abstracted to vine and light macro
dial.camera_shift: macro with shallow depth of field

variations.prompt: same galaxy wreath design with only metallic paint splatter and no LED lights for a more subtle celestial daytime look, medium gray background, soft diffused light, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

dial.palette_shift: gray background, lights removed, splatter is primary element
dial.context_shift: gray wall, no LEDs, splatter only

client_customizations: Two-step ombre dye or spray on pampas tips — blush to champagne or sand to smoke
Comb and fluff styling kit with instructions for achieving full plume effect
3 gold hairpin-style clips for seasonal clip-in accents

hero.notes: pampas plume texture and ombre dye are the signature elements; fluffy and full plumes not flat

variations.prompt: same pampas arc wreath with a sand-to-smoke neutral ombre dye, modern minimal interior background, cooler light, ultra realistic product photo, style raw

client_customizations: Masked sections spray-painted in matte white, charcoal, or a bold color to create geometric bands
Thin contrasting hand-painted line along inner edge of one band
Removable center disk for monogram or seasonal insert

client_customizations: Clear acrylic disks that open to hold pressed florals, ticket stubs, or tiny photos, hanging inside the ring
Mini glass vials for sand, glitter, herbs, or spices with memories attached
